overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Spider-Man video game showing the character walking through an autumn urban neighborhood. The scene transitions from a community shelter facility past residential brownstones to a subway entrance and street crossing, featuring moderate pedestrian activity and warm fall lighting.

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man walks along a concrete sidewalk beside the F.E.A.S.T. community shelter, identifiable by its chain-link fence and banner. The area includes a grassy lot with picnic tables, while pedestrians walk along the path and autumn trees line the street.

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a residential street characterized by historic brownstone buildings with prominent entrance stoops and iron railings. Spider-Man continues walking past parked cars and pedestrians, with trash bags and bicycles visible near the building entrances.

scene_state.functional_zone: subway entrance area with newsstand billboard and green railings

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man passes a subway entrance marked by distinctive green railings and a prominent Daily Bugle billboard. The brownstone buildings recede into the background as the character approaches a busy intersection with visible traffic signals.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection crosswalk with moving traffic

events.description: Spider-Man steps onto crosswalk to cross the street
yellow taxi cab drives past while crossing the intersection

agents.ego_description: Spider-Man crossing the street at the crosswalk between vehicles and pedestrians

entered.detail: white striped pedestrian crossing lines on the asphalt
yellow taxi cab with rooftop advertisement driving through intersection
traffic signal pole with pedestrian crossing signals

segments.scene_description: Spider-Man enters a wide urban intersection, crossing the street via the marked crosswalk. A yellow taxi passes by as the character navigates between pedestrians and vehicles, with the subway entrance receding behind and new buildings approaching on the opposite side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a quiet community area that gradually opens into a bustling urban intersection. It begins with Spider-Man walking along a concrete sidewalk beside the F.E.A.S.T. community shelter, passing a chain-link fence and a grassy lot filled with picnic tables under autumn trees. As the character moves forward, the environment shifts into a residential stretch of historic brownstones featuring iron railings, parked cars, and bicycles leaning against building entrances. The scene then opens up as the brownstones recede, leading the camera past a subway entrance marked by green railings and a large Daily Bugle billboard. Finally, the movement culminates as Spider-Man enters a wide intersection, crossing a marked crosswalk amidst passing yellow taxis and pedestrian traffic.
